events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: confined space work in progress, permit expired mid-shift. OSHA 1910.146 requires permit to be valid for the duration of entry. If permit expires, work must stop, space evacuated, and a new permit issued before re-entry. This is a sequence violation - work continuing with expired permit is non-compliant and dangerous.

Decision: fail
Risk: high or critical - working in confined space without valid permit is serious. I'll say critical.
Work stage: in-progress
Component conditions: non-compliant (the permit/safety control is non-compliant). Maybe installed-defective? The permit isn't really a component. I'll use non-compliant.
Percent complete: maybe 50
Value: 0
Confidence: high
Order: the correct sequence would be: evacuate space, cancel/expire permit, re-evaluate hazards, issue new permit, verify atmosphere, re-enter.
Workable: activities that can start after permit reissued.
Findings: permit expired mid-shift, work continuing without valid entry permit.
Actions: stop work, evacuate confined space, reissue permit, retest atmosphere, verify entrants/attendants before re-entry.
References: OSHA 1910.146
